name: TA-65 metabolic syndrome completed registry
summary: Completed randomized double-masked crossover TA-65 trial in metabolic syndrome, registered as NCT02531334 and now matched to PMID 29546832 for published cardiometabolic and inflammatory biomarker results.
population: Estimated 40 adults aged 32 to 70 years with metabolic syndrome

trial_details.watch_status_reason: ClinicalTrials.gov still lacks a posted registry results table in the June 15, 2026 API view, but the full text of PMID 29546832 identifies the same ClinicalTrials.gov protocol NCT02531334 and University of Connecticut IRB protocol H14-278, so the result evidence is captured through the publication.
trial_details.expected_results_window: ClinicalTrials.gov lists actual primary completion in December 2017 and actual study completion in June 2018. Registry results remain unposted, but the matched publication was indexed in 2018.
trial_details.horizon_note: Results captured through publication; registry-table transparency remains incomplete.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This record should no longer sit in the active late-no-results retirement queue; the remaining interpretation question is how much weight to give a small disease-context biomarker result.
